description_long: This object is a realistic crab positioned on a rough, circular patch of ground. The crab features a broad, slightly domed carapace with a mottled brown and gray coloration, and two prominent, asymmetrical claws—one noticeably larger than the other. Its legs are slender and jointed, splaying outward from the body, with visible segmentation and subtle color gradations from cream to brown. The eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and short antennae are faintly visible. The surface of the crab appears hard and slightly matte, with a naturalistic texture that mimics the exoskeleton of a real crustacean. The ground beneath is rough and earthy, providing a naturalistic base for the crab.
description: A lifelike crab with a broad, mottled carapace and two large claws, resting on a rough, earthy patch. The crab's segmented legs and hard exoskeleton are detailed and naturalistic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's face, both claws extended forward, and eyes on short stalks.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the larger left claw and the segmentation of the walking legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the crab's carapace width and the symmetrical arrangement of its legs.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizing the smaller right claw and the curvature of the body and legs.
